gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (11/305)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (11/305)
text: إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ أَوْحَى إِلَى دَاوُدَ ( عليه السلام ) أَنِ ائْتِ عَبْدِي دَانِيَالَ فَقُلْ لَهُ إِنَّكَ عَصَيْتَنِي فَغَفَرْتُ لَكَ وَ عَصَيْتَنِي فَغَفَرْتُ لَكَ وَ عَصَيْتَنِي فَغَفَرْتُ لَكَ فَإِنْ أَنْتَ عَصَيْتَنِيَ الرَّابِعَةَ لَمْ أَغْفِرْ لَكَ

فَأَتَاهُ دَاوُدُ ( عليه السلام ) فَقَالَ يَا دَانِيَالُ إِنَّنِي رَسُولُ اللَّهِ إِلَيْكَ وَ هُوَ يَقُولُ لَكَ إِنَّكَ عَصَيْتَنِي فَغَفَرْتُ لَكَ وَ عَصَيْتَنِي فَغَفَرْتُ لَكَ وَ عَصَيْتَنِي فَغَفَرْتُ لَكَ فَإِنْ أَنْتَ عَصَيْتَنِيَ الرَّابِعَةَ لَمْ أَغْفِرْ لَكَ فَقَالَ لَهُ دَانِيَالُ قَدْ أَبْلَغْتَ يَا نَبِيَّ اللَّهِ

فَلَمَّا كَانَ فِي السَّحَرِ قَامَ دَانِيَالُ فَنَاجَى رَبَّهُ فَقَالَ يَا رَبِّ إِنَّ دَاوُدَ نَبِيَّكَ أَخْبَرَنِي عَنْكَ أَنَّنِي قَدْ عَصَيْتُكَ فَغَفَرْتَ لِي وَ عَصَيْتُكَ فَغَفَرْتَ لِي وَ عَصَيْتُكَ فَغَفَرْتَ لِي وَ أَخْبَرَنِي عَنْكَ أَنَّنِي إِنْ عَصَيْتُكَ الرَّابِعَةَ لَمْ تَغْفِرْ لِي فَوَ عِزَّتِكَ لَئِنْ لَمْ تَعْصِمْنِي لَأَعْصِيَنَّكَ ثُمَّ لَأَعْصِيَنَّكَ ثُمَّ لَأَعْصِيَنَّكَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father and a number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, altogether from Ibn Mahboub, from Abu Hamza,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Revealed unto Dawood: “Go to My<sup>azwj</sup> servant Daniel and say to him, “You disobeyed Me<sup>azwj</sup> and I<sup>azwj</sup> Forgave you, so you disobeyed Me<sup>azwj</sup> and I<sup>azwj</sup> Forgave you, so you disobeyed Me<sup>azwj</sup> and I<sup>azwj</sup> Forgave you. But if you were to disobey Me<sup>azwj</sup> fourthly, I<sup>azwj</sup> will not Forgive you”.

So Dawood<sup style="font-weight: normal">as</sup> went over and said: ‘O Daniel! I<sup style="font-weight: normal">as</sup> am a Rasool<sup style="font-weight: normal">as</sup> of Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> to you and He<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> is Saying to you “You disobeyed Me<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> and I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Forgave you, so you disobeyed Me<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> and I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Forgave you, so you disobeyed Me<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> and I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Forgave you. But if you were to disobey Me<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> fourthly, I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> will not Forgive you”. So Daniel said to him<sup style="font-weight: normal">as</sup>, ‘You<sup style="font-weight: normal">as</sup> have delivered (the Message), O Prophet<sup style="font-weight: normal">as</sup> of Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>!’.

So when it was the next morning, Daniel stood and whispered to his Lord<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> and he said, ‘O Lord<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>! Dawood<sup style="font-weight: normal">as</sup>, Your<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Prophet<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> informed me that I disobeyed You<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> so You<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Forgave me, and I disobeyed You<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>, so You<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Forgave me, and I disobeyed You<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>, so You<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Forgave me, and he<sup style="font-weight: normal">as</sup> informed me from You<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> that if I were to disobey You<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> for the fourth time, You<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> will not be Forgiving me. So, by Your<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Might, if You<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> will not Defend me, I will (end up) disobeying You<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>, then I will (end up) disobeying You<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>, and I (end up) will disobeying You<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>’’.
en.sarwar: 11. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father and a number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad all from ibn Mahbub from abu Hamza from abu Ja’far (a.s.) who has said the following: “Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, sent revelation to David, ‘Meet My servant Daniel and say to him, ‘You have disobeyed Me and I forgave you, you disobeyed Me, I forgave you, you disobeyed Me and I forgave you. If you will disobey Me the forth time I will not forgive you.’ David went to meet Daniel and said, ‘O Daniel, I am the Messenger of Allah and He says to you, “You disobeyed Me and I forgave you, you disobeyed Me and I forgave you, you disobeyed Me and I forgave you. If you will disobey Me the forth time I will not forgive you.’” Daniel said, ‘O prophet of Allah, you have conveyed your message.’ In the early morning Daniel woke up and prayed to his Lord, saying, ‘O Lord, Your prophet David informed me that I have disobeyed You and You forgave me, I disobeyed You and You forgave me, I disobeyed You and You forgave me and if I will disobey You the forth time You will not forgive me. I swear by Your Majesty, if You will not protect me I will certainly disobey You, I will certainly disobey You, I will certainly disobey You.’”
